pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicit queries for unique_identifier = 'DM-TRIAL-2024'
setup_task.sh unconditionally restoring 'Follow-up Visit' and verifier.py scoring 20 points for its absence (status != 1)
setup_task.sh unconditionally restoring 'Baseline Assessment' and verifier.py deducting 15 points if its status is not 1
export_result.sh tracking '%week%4%safety%', '%week%12%efficacy%', '%unscheduled%safety%', and '%end%treatment%', with verifier.py scoring 20 points for each active status

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env protocol_amendment_events task by confirming that the prerequisite target study 'DM-TRIAL-2024' is synthetically queried and explicit event definitions are seeded or wiped via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL injections. Verified that the expected event to remove ('Follow-up Visit'), the event to keep ('Baseline Assessment'), and the exactly four new events to create ('Week 4 Safety Assessment', 'Week 12 Efficacy Evaluation', 'Unscheduled Safety Visit', 'End of Treatment Visit') strictly match the task description instructions and verifier.py scoring criteria.
